title: Arctic Aurora Bear
summary: A polar bear on an ice floe gazing up at a vivid aurora borealis  -  wildlife-magazine quality.
prompt: A majestic polar bear standing on a small ice floe in the dark Arctic ocean, looking up at a vivid green and pink aurora borealis dancing across a star-filled night sky. The aurora's light reflects on the calm black water and on the bear's fur. Distant icebergs faintly silhouetted. Hyper-realistic wildlife photography style, full-frame DSLR look, cinematic atmosphere, square 16:9 composition.
